title: Synthesis of β-Naphthol Derivatives. Part VI. 3-Alkyl-β-naphthols, 2-Hydroxy-3-naphthaldehyde and its Derivatives
author: M. L. Khorana
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: 3-Methyl-.3-ethyl-, 3-propyl- and 3-butyl- β -naphthols, the corresponding keto- β -naphthols and their methyl ethers, and some derivatives of 2-hydroxy-3-naphthaldehyde, such as, anils, chalkones, and nitro compounds, have been synthesised as potential anti-infective agents.
steps_raw: 3-Methyl-.3-ethyl-, 3-propyl- and 3-butyl- β -naphthols, the corresponding keto- β -naphthols and their methyl ethers, and some derivatives of 2-hydroxy-3-naphthaldehyde, such as, anils, chalkones, and nitro compounds, have been synthesised as potential anti-infective agents.
